options.name: progression_balancing
options.description:
A system that can move progression earlier, to try and prevent the player from getting stuck and bored early.

A lower setting means more getting stuck. A higher setting means less getting stuck.

options.name: accessibility
options.description:
Set rules for reachability of your items/locations.

**Full:** ensure everything can be reached and acquired.

**Minimal:** ensure what is needed to reach your goal can be acquired.

options.name: StartingLevitation
options.description: Start with Progressive Levitation level 1.

options.name: StartingCobwebDuster
options.description: Start with the Cobweb Duster.

options.name: StartingMentalMagnet
options.description: Start with Mental Magnet, pulling health, ammo, and arrowhead drops towards you.

options.name: RandomStartingMinds
options.description: Start with a random number of mind/area unlocking items.

options.name: StartingColorizer
options.description: Start with the Colorizer, allowing you to change the color of your Psiball using the Bacon.

options.name: PsiBallColor
options.description: Choose the starting color of your PsiBall.

options.name: OtherItemsModel
options.description:
Choose what your Archipelago items for other games look like inside Psychonauts
Archipelago: The standard Archipelago symbol.

Classic: The original PsychoRando model for Archipelago items, Bunnies!

Present: Open some holiday gift boxes!

options.name: Goal
options.description:
Win Condition
Asylum Brain Tank: Climb the Asylum and defeat the Coach Oleander Brain Tank.

Brain Hunt: Find the required amount of Camper Brains and re-brain them in Ford's Sanctuary.

Asylum Brain Tank and Brain Hunt: Find the required amount of Camper Brains, AND defeat the Coach Oleander Brain Tank.

choices.name: asylum_brain_tank_and_brain_hunt
choices.display_name: Asylum Brain Tank And Brain Hunt

options.name: BrainsRequired
options.description:
Number of Brains required to collect to Win, or open final door to Meat Circus Final Bosses.

If Goal is not Brain Hunt, or Asylum Brain Tank and Brain Hunt, this does nothing.

options.name: RequireMeatCircus
options.description: Require finishing Meat Circus Final Bosses in addition to your goal.

options.name: RankSanity
options.description: Add Rank Rewards to EVERY Rank Up, instead of the traditional Five Ranks Up.

options.name: FigmentPercentageChecks
options.description:
Controls the maximum percentage of figments needed from each mind that will send checks.

One check is sent for every 20 percent of figments found in each mind, up to the maximum set here.

If set to 0, no figment collecting is required.

options.name: DeepArrowheadShuffle
options.description:
Add Deep Arrowhead checks and shuffle the Dowsing Rod and extra Arrowhead Bundles into the item pool.

Deep Arrowhead locations must be dug up from the ground using the Dowsing Rod and will set a shorter 10-minute
(unpaused in-game time) respawn time after being dug up for the first time. Digging up a Deep Arrowhead again, after
waiting for it to respawn, will award arrowheads like normal and set the normal 30-minute respawn time.

The Deep Arrowheads found under the Lake are not affected by this option.

options.name: MentalCobwebShuffle
options.description:
Add Mental Cobweb checks and shuffle an extra PSI Card into the item pool for each Mental Cobweb.

Mental Cobweb locations must be collected using the Cobweb Duster. Collecting a Mental Cobweb will not add it to
Raz's inventory, so the loom in Ford's Sanctuary will have no use.

options.name: HintUnclaimedBaggage
options.description:
When interacting with Baggage that you don't have a matching tag for yet, automatically creates a hint for 
the location in the client.

options.name: ProgressiveBaggage
options.description:
Turns Emotional Baggage into Progressive Locations

Each time you redeem a Baggage Tag with it's matching Baggage, you'll earn the next check for that type.

options.name: MaximumProgressiveBaggage
options.description:
Maximum amount of each type of Baggage that will give checks.

Only works if Progressive Baggage is Enabled and value is greater than 0.

options.name: VaultHints
options.description: When receiving a Memory Vault, hint a random location in your AP world that hasn't been collected yet.

options.name: VaultCount
options.description: How many Memory Vaults are added to the item pool.

options.name: EasyMillaRace
options.description: Makes collecting figments and winning the race in Milla's Mind easier by removing everyone else from the race.

options.name: EasyFlightMode
options.description:
Replicate the Levitation Flight Glitch by simply holding down float in the air. No more button mashing.
WARNING: Makes getting locations out of logic VERY easy.

options.name: BetterDowsingRod
options.description: Makes the Dowsing Rod gauge fill faster to collect Deep Arrowheads easier.

options.name: EnemyDamageMultiplier
options.description:
Adjust how much damage Raz takes from enemies for an additional challenge.
If set to 0, Raz will take no damage from enemies, but will still flinch.

options.name: InstantDeathMode
options.description: Take any amount of damage, die instantly. Has priority over Enemy Damage Multiplier.

options.name: local_items
options.description: Forces these items to be in their native world.

options.name: non_local_items
options.description: Forces these items to be outside their native world.

options.name: start_inventory
options.description:
Start with the specified amount of these items and don't place them in the world. Example: "Bomb: 1"

The game decides what the replacement items will be.

options.name: start_hints
options.description: Start with these item's locations prefilled into the ``!hint`` command.

options.name: start_location_hints
options.description: Start with these locations and their item prefilled into the ``!hint`` command.
